200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Great Jurassic Challenge
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: AM4


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Ancient Terror amulet

Enhances the wearer when the battle starts. The effect depends on the wearer’s class :
- The Tank deals 20% more damage. The effect lasts for 8 sec, gradually wearing off over time. When the effect has completely worn off, all tanks are healed by 3% of their max health and receive a shield whose durability equals 3% of their max health.

- The Mage has their spell power increased by 20%. The effect lasts for 8 sec, gradually wearing off over time. When the effect has completely worn off, the wearer resurrects 2 allies. The resurrected allies cannot take damage or be healed for 1 sec.

- The Archer takes 25% less damage. The effect lasts for 8 sec, gradually wearing off over time. When the effect has completely worn off, all archers have the damage done by their next attack enhanced by 200%. That attack cannot be dodged.

Requirements: 98-100
